description:
\}Hair ornament decorated with
flowers. A popular item among girls.
\n also smells like flowers.
name: Flower hair ornament

description:
\}A slightly larger ribbon. A very
cute item. Looks adorable on anyone.
name: Ribbon

description:
\}Traditional accessory. Used as a
hair ornament.\nCan also be used to
hold hairstyles in place.
name: Hairpin

description:
\}Ribbon-shaped hairband. It's a truly
cute item. \nCuteness congestion
occurs.
name: Headband

description:
\}Donut-shaped hair accessory. A
simple fashionable item. \nEasy to
put on and take off.
name: Scrunchie

description:
\}A hair fastener. Surprisingly
convenient item.\nAre there any
other ways to use it...?
name: Hairpin.

description:
\}A popular hat for girls. The first
step towards fashion. \nBe careful
not to get stuffy.
name: Hat

description:
\}A perfect hat for summer. It might
be a little subtle in other
seasons.\nIt could enhance your
elegance.
name: Straw Hat

description:
\}A soft and flat hat. It's difficult
to pull off. Is it from an old manga
artist, I wonder?
name: Beret

description:
\}It's fluffy and warm. But it's a bit
tough to wear in the summer.
\nWearing it in the winter is the
best.
name: Knit cap

description:
\}A hat that's as easy to understand
as possible. Basically, it's a
baseball cap. \nWhich team is it?
name: Cap hat

description:
\}Toy earrings. There is no need to
pierce a hole. The quality is high.
name: Toy earrings.

description:
\}An accessory worn on the ear. Scared
to pierce a hole? But it's really
cute.
name: Stylish earrings.

description:
\}Red earrings that stand out. Do they
make you feel excited? That's how I
feel.
name: Red Earrings

description:
\}Piercing with a noticeable blue
color. Does it make you feel
calm?\nIs it a misunderstanding, I
wonder?
name: Blue earrings.

description:
\}Sunflower-shaped earrings. They make
your heart warm and fuzzy. They also
look cute.
name: Sunflower Earrings

description:
\}The amount earned has increased
slightly. Limited to easy combat.
\nGood luck with money.
name: Lucky Earrings

description:
\}Lovely shoes made of leather.
However, they are not suitable for
sports. The sound when walking is
nice.
name: Leather shoes

description:
\}Functional and stylish shoes. They
are easy to wear and
comfortable.\nSuitable for exercise.
name: Sports shoes

description:
\}A type of leather shoe. You can
easily put it on and take it off.
\nThese are really comfortable
shoes.
name: Loafer

description:
\}A type of athletic shoes. They have
a wide price range. The expensive
ones are really amazing.
name: Sneakers

description:
\}A type of women's shoes. It is
difficult to wear for long periods
of time. \nThere are many situations
where this is required.
name: Pumps

description:
\}Women's footwear. Can men wear them
if they try...? Not recommended
though.
name: High heels.

description:
\}Simply put, boots. It's also a pain
to put on and take off. \nBut it's
popular.
name: Boots

description:
\}A ring for children. But the quality
is high. It doesn't look like a toy.
name: Toy Ring

description:
\}A simple ring. Simple is the best.
\nSimple is best.
name: Simple Ring

description:
\}A beautiful silver ring. It's picky,
but very popular. \nDoes it hurt
your eyes a little?
name: Metallic Ring

description:
\}A very stylish ring. It is
expensive, but it is worth it. \nIt
can't be helped that it is
expensive.
name: Stylish ring.

description:
\}A beautifully colored ring. It truly
is a stunning piece. I can't help
but be mesmerized by it.
name: Beautiful ring.

description:
\}Experience points gained will
increase by a little. It is limited
to easy battles. \nExperience is
extremely important.
name: Goddess' Ring

description:
\}A ring that protects clothing from
damage. Allows you to not worry
about your outfit. \V[259] Can avoid
the attacks of dangerous enemies.
name: Ring of Immortality

description:
\}A very ordinary amulet. I feel
strangely relieved. \nIt also calms
your mind.
name: Talisman

description:
\}I feel a tremendous power of
protection. Will this make me safe?
I have no choice but to believe.
name: Talisman for warding off bad luck

description:
\}Talisman as its name implies. It
helps you feel at ease. \nSafety
comes from within.
name: Traffic safety talisman

description:
\}Love charm. It all depends on the
person. \nPersonality is what
matters.
name: Love Fulfillment Charm

description:
\}A charm related to competition. It
must have a meaning for sure. I
understand the feeling of relying on
it.
name: Victory Prayer Charm

description:
\}A common keychain. It's popular
among both men and women. It has
various uses.
name: Keychain

description:
\}A popular character item. More
popular than God? \nVery famous and
popular.
name: A keychain of a certain popular character.

description:
\}A character from an unknown work. A
product aimed at a niche audience.
It's truly a niche item.
name: Mysterious character keychain

description:
\}A candy keychain. It smells good. It
unexpectedly looks delicious.
name: Sweets keychain.

description:
\}Simple product design. It may be
simple, but it has its popularity.
\nPopularity due to simplicity.
name: Simple Keychain

description:
\}A petal-shaped keychain. It's truly
adorable merchandise. Popular among
women.
name: Flower Keychain

description:
\}An adult toy for intimate use. HP is
automatically restored. Pleasurable
vibrations.
name: Adult Toy (Blue)

description:
\}A toy exclusively for intimate
moments. SP automatically
recovers.\nIt's best to use it in
secret.
name: Adult toy (Pink)

description:
\}An adult toy exclusively for
intimate purposes. It is a new
product. \nI obtained it through a
pre-release experience.
name: Adult Toy (New Release)

description:
\}Ninja-like shoes. Ninja style! Makes
you feel really cool.
name: Ninja Boots

description:
\}Angel Wing-Shaped Earrings. A
special and rare item. Not for sale.
name: Angel Earrings
